experiences.job_description: Led development of microservices architecture handling 1M+ daily requests. Mentored team of 5 junior developers. Reduced API response time by 40% through optimization. Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions.
Built React-based dashboard for real-time analytics. Developed RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express. Integrated third-party payment systems. Improved test coverage from 45% to 85%.
Developed responsive web applications using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Collaborated with design team to implement UI/UX improvements. Maintained and debugged legacy PHP applications.

projects.name: Open Source Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Built an open-source real-time analytics dashboard used by 500+ developers. Features include custom widgets, data visualization, and API integrations.

targetJobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
targetJobs.description: We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Cloud Platform team. You will design and implement scalable distributed systems, mentor junior engineers, and drive technical decisions. Requirements: 5+ years of experience in software development, expertise in distributed systems, proficiency in Go or Java, experience with Kubernetes and cloud infrastructure.

targetJobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
targetJobs.description: Join Stripe's Payments team to build the infrastructure that powers internet commerce. You'll work on high-throughput, low-latency systems processing billions of dollars. Requirements: Strong experience with TypeScript/JavaScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, understanding of payment systems and financial APIs, experience with microservices architecture.
